wikitext:
{{#setmainimage:StS2_Morphic_Grove.png|quiet}} {{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Under Construction}} {{Keyword Infobox|Transform|2}}
Transforming a card acts as removing that card and adding a random eligible card to the deck. This means it will trigger all the effects of both Card removals and Card additions.

== Rules ==
* {{KW|Eternal||2}} cards also cannot be transformed, as stated in its tooltip.
* Every eligible card has an equal chance of being Transformed into, regardless of Rarity. This means if you're playing the {{2|Silent}}, you're just as likely to see a {{C|Serpent Form||2}} as a {{C|Dagger Spray||2}}.
** Each character has 20 Commons, 35 Uncommons, and 25 Rares in Singleplayer mode, so Transforming a Basic card gives a 25% chance for a Common, 43.75% for an Uncommon, and 31.25% for a Rare.
** In {{2|Multiplayer}}, each character has one more Uncommon and Rare, shifting the odds slightly to ~24.39% Common, 43.90% Uncommon, and 31.71% Rare.
* You can never get back the same card after Transforming, nor can you ever get a {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic|Basic card|2}}. You can never Transform randomly into an {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded}} card without {{R|Molten Egg||2}}, {{R|Toxic Egg||2}}, or {{R|Frozen Egg||2}}.
* If a player obtains a card of a different class than the character they're playing, it will Transform into a card of its own class. This means if {{C|Afterimage||2}} is Transformed as the {{2|Defect}} you will only ever get a {{2|Silent}} card.
* Transforming a {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic|Basic card|2}} will give you a different card than Transforming a Rare/Uncommon/Common. If Transforming {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} and Colored cards, order can change the Transforms.
* An {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} card will transform into Rare, Uncommon, or Common card of its own class. This means that {{C|Neow's Fury||2}} cannot transform into {{C|Brightest Flame||2}}, but it can transform into {{C|Discovery||2}}.
* A {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}} will only Transform into another {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}}. 
<!-- to be tested A {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Token|Token card|2}} or {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless card|2}} will only Transform into a {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless card|2}}. -->

== Interactions ==
* {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}} gives you +15 {{2|Gold}} when a card is Transformed.
* {{R|Bing Bong||2}} adds another copy of whatever the card transforms into.
* When a card is Transformed while the player holds either {{R|Molten Egg}}, {{R|Toxic Egg}} or {{R|Frozen Egg}}, the new card will be upgraded provided its type matches the Egg that would upgrade it.
* Transforming a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}} will give +6 max HP with {{R|Darkstone Periapt||2}}.
<!-- to be tested *{{R|Fresnel Lens||2}} enchants the resulting card with nimble if it gains block -->

== Sources ==
Unless otherwise stated, all sources of '''Transform''' allow you to choose which cards are '''Transformed'''.
=== Ancients ===
===== Neow =====
* {{R|Leafy Poultice||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Transform''' 1 of your {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic&search:Strike|Strikes|2}} and 1 of your {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic&search:Defend|Defends|2}} and lose 12 Max HP.
* {{R|New Leaf||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Transform''' 1 card.
===== Orobas =====
* {{R|Archaic Tooth||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Transform''' a starter card into an ancient version.
** The targeted card is shown in its description while in-game.
** If the original card was {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}, the resulting {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient}} card will also be {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}.
===== Tanx =====
* {{R|Claws||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Transform''' up to 6 cards into {{C|Maul||2}}.
** Any {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} cards chosen will result in an {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} {{C|Maul||2}}.
===== Darv =====
* {{R|Astrolabe||2}} - Upon pickup, '''Transform''' 3 cards, then {{KW|Upgrade}} them.
* {{R|Pandora's Box}} - Upon pickup, '''Transform''' all  {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic&search:Strike|Strikes|2}} and {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic&search:Defend|Defends|2}}.

=== Events ===
* {{E|Aroma of Chaos|2}} {{Frame|Let Go}} - {{TS|positive||'''Transform''' a card in your Deck.}}
* {{E|Morphic Grove|2}} {{Frame|Group}} - {{TS|negative||Lose ALL of your Gold.}} {{TS|positive||'''Transform''' 2 cards.}}
* {{E|Whispering Hollow|2}} {{Frame|Hug the Tree}} - {{TS|negative||Lose 9 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Choose a card to '''Transform'''.}}
* {{E|Wood Carvings|2}}
** {{Frame|Bird}} - {{TS|positive||Choose 1 starter card to '''Transform''' into {{C|Peck||2}}.}}
** {{Frame|Torus}} - {{TS|positive||Choose 1 starter card to '''Transform''' into {{C|Toric Toughness||2}}.}}
* {{E|Endless Conveyor|2}} {{Frame|Grab Something Off the Belt}} - '''Transform''' a card.
** This option gives a random dish, where Jelly Liver is the one that gives a '''Transform'''.
* {{E|The Trial|2}} {{Frame|DECIDE: Innocent}} - {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Doubt||2}} (curse) to your Deck.}} {{TS|positive||'''Transform''' 2 cards.}}
** Only when the ''Nondescript Trial'' is selected.

=== Cards ===
These cards will '''Transform''' a card temporarily during combat and will not affect your actual deck. This also means it will not trigger any effects that occur when adding or removing cards to your deck.
* {{C|Primal Force||2}} - Transform all {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} in your hand into {{C|Giant Rock||2}}({{TS|positive||+}}).
* {{C|BEGONE!||2}} - Choose a card in your Hand to '''Transform''' into {{C|Minion Strike||2}}({{TS|positive||+}}).
* {{C|CHARGE!!||2}} - Choose 2 cards in your Draw Pile to '''Transform''' into {{C|Minion Dive Bomb||2}}({{TS|positive||+}}).
* {{C|GUARDS!!!||2}} - Choose any number of cards in your Hand to '''Transform''' into {{C|Minion Sacrifice||2}}({{TS|positive||+}}).
* {{C|Seance||2}} - '''Transform''' a card in your Draw Pile into {{C|Soul||2}}.
* {{C|Compact||2}} - '''Transform''' all {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status|Status|2}} cards in your hand into {{C|Fuel||2}}({{TS|positive||+}})
* {{C|Entropy||2}} - At the start of your turn, '''Transform''' 1 card in your Hand.
